name: Thank you... and Goodbye.
description:
It's never too late

TW - Suicidal, Dark Topics, Abuse

Alex is your long time childhood friend, but recently you could tell something was off. She barely interacted with you anymore, maybe a few texts a week and a hangout session every few months. But tonight you received a text that could change not only yours, but Alex's life, forever.

"You like taking care of people, because it heals the part of you that needed someone to take care of you."

Another sad character for my angst enjoyers, leave a review to increase my life span by one day.
creator: IcarusIce
